behavior_summary: Handles the player 'U8P_APASTAT::look' (examine) action for this NPC/object: when examined it emits a short descriptive bark and then yields control to the engine.
Chooses between two short text barks depending on the global flag ancientOnesMet: if true the bark is "Apathas", otherwise the bark is "male statue ".
After emitting the chosen bark the process calls suspend to yield/end the U8P_APASTAT::look handling.
notable_control_flow: Single conditional branch based on the global flag ancientOnesMet that selects which bark text to show.
Deterministic linear flow: check flag -> emit bark -> suspend.
No parameters, no locals, and no helper functions invoked; behavior is fully contained in the U8P_APASTAT::look process.
open_questions: Is the trailing space in the fallback bark text "male statue " intentional or an artifact of extraction?
Under what game events and other scripts is ancientOnesMet set (not present in this file)?
Is this entity represented as a statue or an NPC named Apathas in other data (context-dependent naming across assets)?

main_function.name: U8P_APASTAT::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description/bark shown when the player examines this NPC/object; select text based on global state and then yield.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player performs a Look/Examine action on this entity (process type 0x0208).
Also runs when the engine triggers a U8P_APASTAT::look-type inspect event for the object/NPC.

function_map.name: U8P_APASTAT::look
function_map.role: U8P_APASTAT::look/examine handler that selects and emits a short bark based on global state

function_map.name: suspend
function_map.role: engine call to yield or pause the process after emitting a bark

external_calls.purpose: Yield control / end the U8P_APASTAT::look process after showing the bark

reads.name: ancientOnesMet
reads.likely_effect: Selects which short description/bark to display: true -> "Apathas", false -> "male statue ".

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Handles the player 'U8P_APASTAT::look' (examine) action for this NPC/object: when examined it emits a short descriptive bark and then yields control to the engine.
